commands.purpose: Print SettingsRegistry contents. --group scopes to one; --check-drift compares compiled registry to persisted snapshot.
Write default values from the registry into SettingValue rows for the target scope. --force overwrites existing values.
Print resolved values for a group + scope combination. --reveal-sensitive requires super_admin + writes an audit row per revealed field.
Dispatch ExportSettingsJob or run synchronously with --sync. Writes to --out path or storage module.
